title: Enable git-daemon tests
body:
...by bumping up the CI VM ID to ones that include the
git-daemon (Fedora) or git-daemon-run (Ubuntu) packages.

Reason: #3701 rewrote some tests to work around github
closing 'git://' protocol access... but those new tests
were simply being skipped.

Reference: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/12851

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Confirmed. The `git-context` (79) and `gitrepo with .git and branch` (210) tests passed in
* [fedora 34 overlay](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6300208240787456/logs/integration_test.log)
* [fedora 35 overlay](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/5174308333944832/logs/integration_test.log)
* [ubuntu vfs](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/5737258287366144/logs/integration_test.log)

Prior to this PR those tests were skipped (yellow).
